name: Asher
description:
❤️‍🩹 ││ [Version 3: extra angst version] You two have been best friends your whole life. You've never seen him as anything more than, even when he confessed to you a couple years back. But now that he's gotten a girlfriend and you've seen just how good he fucks her, you've started to have a change of heart

**This is the eighth bot of the Heartbreak Haven Series**

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------




[Version 1](https://janitorai.com/characters/b085f08d-18f1-4cf8-8e69-56cd8d6e041e_character-asher): The AC is broken and he needs your help cooling down
[Version 2](https://janitorai.com/characters/45876818-c9d3-4785-a7e5-da9c1a8262f0_character-asher): You walk in on him fucking Nina
Version 3: He asks you to move out because Nina doesn't want you living with him anymore

I have a 4th scenario on Venus where you bump into him accidentally as he's coming out of the shower but its short and simple. With the way people were complaining about short messages I'm not going to post it since I fear people would have a conniption, so for now, until J.ai has a feature where you can add alt messages to one bot I'm not going to post it sorry 😭
 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you to [Raven Sama](https://janitorai.com/profiles/f800f036-6528-496f-b590-04434f0fc894_profile-of-raven-sama) for fixing the picture for me 

Bot Template by: [Raven Sama](https://janitorai.com/profiles/f800f036-6528-496f-b590-04434f0fc894_profile-of-raven-sama)

*Anypov*

This is the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood

 [Discord Server! 18+ only](https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF)
This will be displayed in your character detail, not including in prompt or influence your character.
creator: CherryFiles
